You need to have Zen Browser installed to install this theme.

[Download now!](https://zen-browser.app/download)

[Back](https://zen-browser.app/mods)

Transparent Zen

Make the Zen Browser's tab background transparent, get smooth animations and more. Enable features in mod settings and visit the homepage below to learn more about the features. 👇

![Transparent Zen](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zen-browser/theme-store/main/themes/642854b5-88b4-4c40-b256-e035532109df/image.png)

Created by [sameerasw](https://github.com/sameerasw) • **v1.17.16**

Creation date: **Feb 4, 2025**

Latest update: **Mar 11, 2026**

[Visit mod homepage](https://www.sameerasw.com/zen)

Install Mod 🎉Uninstall Mod

[Zen Browser](https://zen-browser.app/)

Beautifully designed, privacy-focused, and packed with features. We care about your experience, not your data.

[Download](https://zen-browser.app/download)
